---
title: "1-CensusQAQC (CO2xComm)"
output: html_document
date: "2024-01-29"
---

```{r}
######################################################################################
############ 2022 PROGRAMS FOR ERROR CHECKING AND TRANSFERRING CENSUS DATA ###########
######################################################################################

install.packages("readr")
install.packages("tidyverse")
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)

# Import Census CSV file
Census <- read_csv("S:/Biogeochemistry/GCREW/1-CO2xCommunity Experiment/1-Plant Biomass & CN Data/Shoot Biomass Data/2022/Data/1-CO2xComm SC Census (Filled).csv") %>%
  select(-Notes, -PassFail)

```


```{r}
######################################################################################
############ STEP 1 -- RUN QA/QC PROGRAMS FOR ERROR CHECKING CENSUS DATA #############
######################################################################################

# Data cleaning and flagging
CensusQAQC <- Census %>%
  mutate(HFlag = ifelse(Total_Height < Green_Height, 1, 0),
         HFlag = ifelse(Total_Height > 223 | (Total_Height < 5 & Total_Height > 0), 1, HFlag),
         WFlag = ifelse(Width > 8.4 | (Width < 0.2 & Width > 0), 1, 0),
         ZFlag = ifelse(is.na(Total_Height) | is.na(Green_Height) | is.na(Width), 1, 0))
CensusQAQC <- subset(CensusQAQC, HFlag != 0 | WFlag != 0 | ZFlag != 0)

# Remove observations where Rep is 99
CensusQAQC <- CensusQAQC %>%
  filter(Rep != 99)

# Export the cleaned data
write_csv(CensusQAQC, "S:/Biogeochemistry/GCREW/1-CO2xCommunity Experiment/1-Plant Biomass & CN Data/Shoot Biomass Data/2022/Data/1-CensusQAQC Error Report_SAS-R.csv")

```


```{r}
######################################################################################
############ STEP 2 -- RUN QA/QC PROGRAMS FOR ERROR CHECKING DENSITY DATA ############
######################################################################################

# Import Density CSV file
Density <- read_csv("S:/Biogeochemistry/GCREW/1-CO2xCommunity Experiment/1-Plant Biomass & CN Data/Shoot Biomass Data/2022/Data/2-CO2xComm SC Density (Filled).csv") %>%
  select(-Notes)

# Creating DensityQAQC dataset
DensityQAQC <- Density %>%
  mutate(QDFlag = ifelse(Stem_Count > 166, 1, 0),
         ZFlag = ifelse(is.na(Stem_Count), 1, 0)) 
DensityQAQC <- subset(DensityQAQC, QDFlag != 0 | ZFlag != 0)

# Exporting the DensityQAQC dataset
write_csv(DensityQAQC, "S:/Biogeochemistry/GCREW/1-CO2xCommunity Experiment/1-Plant Biomass & CN Data/Shoot Biomass Data/2022/Data/2-DensityQAQC Error Report_SAS-R.csv")


```


```{r}
############################################################################
############ STEP 3 -- GENERATE CENSUS OUTPUT FILE FOR TRANSFER ############
############################################################################

# Importing the Census dataset
Census <- read_csv("S:/Biogeochemistry/GCREW/1-CO2xCommunity Experiment/1-Plant Biomass & CN Data/Shoot Biomass Data/2022/Data/1-CO2xComm SC Census (Filled).csv") %>%
  select(-Notes, -PassFail)

# Creating CensusTransfer dataset
CensusTransfer <- Census %>%
  filter(Rep != 99) %>%
  mutate(Miner = -99,
         Rust = -99,
         Flower = -99)

# Exporting the CensusTransfer dataset
write_csv(CensusTransfer %>% select(-Rep), "S:/Biogeochemistry/GCREW/1-CO2xCommunity Experiment/1-Plant Biomass & CN Data/Shoot Biomass Data/2022/Data/1-Census (for transfer)_SAS-R.csv")

```

```{r}
############################################################################
############ STEP 4 -- GENERATE DENSITY OUTPUT FILE FOR TRANSFER  ##########
############################################################################

# Read the dataset into R
Density <- read_csv("S:/Biogeochemistry/GCREW/1-CO2xCommunity Experiment/1-Plant Biomass & CN Data/Shoot Biomass Data/2022/Data/2-CO2xComm SC Density (Filled).csv") %>%
  select(-Notes)

# Apply the transformations
DensityTransfer <- Density %>%
  mutate(Chamber_Area = case_when(
    Treatment %in% c("A", "E") ~ 0.53,
    # area of new hexagon chambers
    Treatment == "C" ~ 0.47,))
    # area of control plots unchanged

# Export the data to CSV
write_csv(DensityTransfer, 'S:/Biogeochemistry/GCREW/1-CO2xCommunity Experiment/1-Plant Biomass & CN Data/Shoot Biomass Data/2022/Data/2-Density (for transfer)_SAS-R.csv')

# Updated on 2.13.24 by CN
# Passed dummy data test on 2.13.24 by CN

```
